description: In the upper margin, draft of the beginning of a legal document in Arabic script. "On Monday, in Ramaḍān '35. . . ." The century is not specified. The main use of this fragment is writing exercises of Isaiah 42:1-2 in at least two different hands.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
